Stack/tight.$description: Dense vertical gap for tightly related elements. Alias: spacing-xs.

Stack/text.$description: Vertical rhythm for text blocks. Alias: spacing-lg.

Stack/default.$description: Default vertical gap for component internals. Alias: spacing-xl.

Stack/group.$description: Vertical gap between related component groups. Alias: spacing-3xl.

Inline/group.$description: Horizontal gap for grouped inline actions. Alias: spacing-xl.

Container/padding.$description: Desktop horizontal container padding. Alias: spacing-4xl.
